problem id: 15305f6a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) OR SHL(4)

examples:
  01011010 -> 11101001
  10101000 -> 10100010
  00000011 -> 00111100
  11110000 -> 11000011
  01010101 -> 01010101
  10000011 -> 00111110
  01100110 -> 11111001
  10110011 -> 11111110

query: 01011101
predicted answer: 11110101
